motion_rule.author: Reviewing Attorney
motion_rule.basis: motion for summary judgment on the contract count, M.R.Civ.P. Rule 56(b); no genuine issue of material fact on formation, breach, or damages

motion_relief: enter summary judgment for the Plaintiff on Count I of the Complaint
allegations:
John N. Poe and the Defendant entered into a written services agreement dated March 3, 2025.

The undisputed material facts, set forth in the Plaintiff's accompanying statement of material facts pursuant to M.R.Civ.P. 56(h)(1), establish that the Defendant failed to pay the invoiced amounts due under the agreement.

There is no genuine issue as to any material fact, and the Plaintiff is entitled to judgment on Count I as a matter of law.
